name: Chicken Dish
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbells cream of chicken soup
1/2 cup pine nuts or sliced almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the mayonnaise, soup, and sour cream.
2. Add the chicken and vegetables (onion, celery, mushrooms, waterchestnuts).
3. Microwave on high for 6 minutes.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 baking dish.
5. Spread the Pillsbury crescent rolls over the top to make a crust.
6. Top with shredded cheese, drizzle butter over the top, and sprinkle with pine nuts or sliced almonds.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-40 minutes until cooked and browned.
8. Cool for 5 minutes.
9. Slice down the middle and then three additional cuts to make a total of eight pieces.
10. Serves 4 people (2 slices each).
